architecture_audit.read_policy: Use for historical provider/state-management context; prefer controller_patterns for current controller rules.

audit_registry.read_policy: Read first for recursive audit workflow, registry files, completion criteria, and pruning policy.

audit_backlog.read_policy: Use for active backlog, next-up order, stable debt ids, scanner counts, stream lifecycle queue, and branded error UI queue.

audit_doc_summaries.read_policy: Use for compact read/skip policies before opening long markdown docs, including stream lifecycle, widget catalog rule routing, Firestore rules test workflow, and error catalogue scope.

audit_doc_versions.read_policy: Use for durable doc version metadata and read policies.

audit_rules.read_policy: Use for active/watch/archived recursive audit rules, including widget catalog updates, realtime stream lifecycle constraints, branded error UI requirements, Firestore rules emulator-test workflow, and error catalogue maintenance.

controller_patterns.read_policy: Read for controller/view-model boundary rules and realtime stream lifecycle ownership before architecture or state-management cleanup.

docs_index.read_policy: Read before adding, deleting, or consolidating docs.

deploy_runbook.read_policy: Use for the May 2026 relationship-doc deployment sequence; re-verify environment, beta data strategy, Remote Config force-update timing, and command outputs before acting.

error_handling_audit.read_policy: Use as the current error-handling snapshot, error 101 guide, app error catalogue, naming convention, and branded error surface guidance; re-verify counts before treating scanner totals as current.

firestore_contract_tracker.read_policy: Read before Firestore rules, Functions mutation, schema-sync, data-contract work, or Firestore rules test execution.

backend_operation_catalog.read_policy: Read before changing repository writes, callable interfaces, trigger-owned projections, server-only collections, Firestore rules for write paths, or notification fan-out.

firestore_relationship_documents_migrati.read_policy: Read before changing relationship arrays, edge/action documents, match-scoped messages, relationship migration tooling, or deletion/anonymization cleanup.

firestore_type_sync.read_policy: Read before changing Dart domain models, Functions TypeScript interfaces, or Firestore type generation.

compensation_bar_assessment.read_policy: Use as dated quality-assessment context only; re-run current verification before acting.

pre_launch_audit.read_policy: Use for launch-readiness context; re-verify code paths and statuses before acting.

project_context.read_policy: Use as the high-level repo map; prefer audit registry and focused docs for pass-specific rules.

repo_readme.read_policy: Use for self-serve setup/runbook context; re-check scripts before giving commands.

sliver_layout.read_policy: Read before changing sliver-native screens, NestedScrollView tabs, or scroll tests.

ui_layout_spacing.read_policy: Read before adding or changing shared screen padding, tab body insets, sliver body gaps, or reusable card/photo spacing contracts.

widget_catalog.read_policy: Use as widget inventory and update it when widget APIs, ownership models, sliver/tab structures, or reusable design-system roles materially change.

widget_cleanup.read_policy: Use as a short human-readable pointer; use backlog.json for active machine-readable state including stream lifecycle and branded error UI queues.
